key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh Codex usage from the backend, in seconds.

key.name: display-mode
key.description: Show usage in the panel as text, a progress bar, or both.

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the icon in the top panel.

key.name: auth-file
key.description: Path to the Codex auth.json file. Empty uses ~/.codex/auth.json.

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: Optional HTTP proxy URL used for the usage request.
